zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Philippa Lovell於大約1381年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Sir John Lovel, KN, KG42歲，母親Maud de Holand27歲。她於1402年之後與Sir John Dinham結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年5月15日享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文金斯可斯維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Philippa Lovell于大约1381年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Sir John Lovel, KN, KG42岁，母亲Maud de Holand27岁。她于1402年之后与Sir John Dinham结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年5月15日享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文金斯可斯維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Philippa Lovell was born about 1381, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, was 42 and her mother, Maud de Holand, was 27. She married Sir John Dinham after 1402. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 15 May 1465, at the age of 85, and was buried in Kingskerswell, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Philippa Lovell est née environ 1381, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Maud de Holand, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Dinham après 1402. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1465, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Kingskerswell, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Philippa Lovell um 1381 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Lovel, KN, KG 42 und ihre Mutter Maud de Holand 27. Sie hat nach 1402 Sir John Dinham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1465 im Alter von 85 Jahren und wurde in Kingskerswell, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Philippa Lovell è nata il circa 1381 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Maud de Holand, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Dinham dopo il 1402. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1465, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Kingskerswell, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Philippa Lovellが約1381年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Lovel, KN, KGは42歳，母Maud de Holandは27歳であった。1402年以後にSir John Dinhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年5月15日に85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンキングスケルスウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Philippa Lovell(이)가 대략 1381년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Lovel, KN, KG(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Holand(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1402년 이후 Sir John Dinham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 5월 15일 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 킨그스커스웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Philippa Lovell nasceu aproximadamente 1381, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Holand, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Dinham após 1402. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1465, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Kingskerswell, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Philippa Lovell родилась около 1381 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Lovel, KN, KG было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Holand, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Dinham после 1402 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 15 мая 1465 г. в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности кингскирсвелл, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Philippa Lovell nació aproximadamente 1381, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Maud de Holand, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir John Dinham después de 1402. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1465, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Kingskerswell, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
